commits.message: docs: add Anand voice engine system prompt for Reddit bot
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: fix: add OG image meta tags for /outofyourleague route
commits.author: shalombook

panels.title: docs: add Anand voice engine system prompt for Reddit bot
panels.scene: A villager is bowing down to a small, dusty scroll, tears streaming down their face. The knight stands beside them, holding a microphone and looking perplexed. In the background, villagers are arguing about the correct pronunciation of 'Anand'.

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It's a system prompt. It just tells it what to say.

panels.title: fix: add OG image meta tags for /outofyourleague route
panels.scene: A village artist is frantically painting a giant, ornate picture frame around a road sign that says '/outofyourleague'. Other villagers are snapping pictures with wooden cameras. The Knight adjusts the sign slightly.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The images... they *appear* on the Link Books now!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: I added meta tags. It helps with previews.

panels.title: fix: add OG image meta tags for /outofyourleague route
panels.scene: The same sign '/outofyourleague' now has hundreds of villagers lined up to take pictures of themselves next to it. One villager is trying to climb on top. The Knight stands to the side, arms crossed, looking tired.

panels.title: 2 commits. 1 Reddit bot update. 1 meta tag fix. 0 sleep.
panels.scene: The Knight slumps against a stone wall, eyes closed. Behind him, villagers are erecting a billboard-sized version of the Reddit bot's logo and the `/outofyourleague` road sign.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We shall celebrate the Meta Tag Day every year!
